label: US 3M yield
explain: Rates trend with the policy cycle, so directional momentum pays: RSI momentum goes long rates when the yield's own momentum turns up and long duration when it rolls over.

label: US 2Y yield
explain: Rates trend with the policy cycle, so directional momentum pays: Donchian breakout goes long rates when the yield's own momentum turns up and long duration when it rolls over. The belly (5Y/7Y) times the cleanest.

label: US 5Y yield
explain: Rates trend with the policy cycle, so directional momentum pays: RSI momentum goes long rates when the yield's own momentum turns up and long duration when it rolls over. The belly (5Y/7Y) times the cleanest.

label: US 7Y yield (interp)
explain: Rates trend with the policy cycle, so directional momentum pays: RSI momentum goes long rates when the yield's own momentum turns up and long duration when it rolls over. The belly (5Y/7Y) times the cleanest.

label: US 10Y yield
explain: Rates trend with the policy cycle, so directional momentum pays: RSI momentum goes long rates when the yield's own momentum turns up and long duration when it rolls over.

label: US 30Y yield
explain: Rates trend with the policy cycle, so directional momentum pays: RSI momentum goes long rates when the yield's own momentum turns up and long duration when it rolls over.

label: 2s10s (10Y-2Y)
explain: The 2s10s (10Y-2Y) oscillates around its range, so RSI reversion fades extremes — buy a flat curve, sell a steep one.

label: 3m10y (10Y-3M)
explain: The 3m10y (10Y-3M) steepens in easing cycles and flattens in hiking cycles — long, persistent moves that RSI momentum follows (long the steepener when the slope's momentum is up).

label: 5s10s (10Y-5Y)
explain: The 5s10s (10Y-5Y) steepens in easing cycles and flattens in hiking cycles — long, persistent moves that EMA Cross follows (long the steepener when the slope's momentum is up).

label: 5s30s (30Y-5Y)
explain: The 5s30s (30Y-5Y) steepens in easing cycles and flattens in hiking cycles — long, persistent moves that RSI momentum follows (long the steepener when the slope's momentum is up).

label: 2s5s10s fly
explain: A butterfly is a pure relative-value trade with little directional drift, so it mean-reverts: RSI reversion fades a rich/cheap belly back to fair — the strongest risk-adjusted edge on the curve.

label: 5s10s30s fly
explain: A butterfly is a pure relative-value trade with little directional drift, so it mean-reverts: RSI reversion fades a rich/cheap belly back to fair — the strongest risk-adjusted edge on the curve.

label: 2s5s10s RW-fly (hedge ~0.23/0.88)
explain: A butterfly is a pure relative-value trade with little directional drift, so it mean-reverts: RSI reversion fades a rich/cheap belly back to fair — the strongest risk-adjusted edge on the curve.

label: 5s10s30s RW-fly (hedge ~0.52/0.53)
explain: A butterfly is a pure relative-value trade with little directional drift, so it mean-reverts: RSI reversion fades a rich/cheap belly back to fair — the strongest risk-adjusted edge on the curve.
